channel.title: Db Cooper on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in Db Cooper on Grim Chronicle

item.title: D.B. Cooper: The Only Unsolved Air Piracy in American History
item.description: On November 24, 1971, a man calling himself Dan Cooper hijacked a Northwest Orient flight, collected $200,000 in ransom, and parachuted into the night sky over the Pacific Northwest. He was never found. This is the full story.
